description: High-contrast, two-tone (deep blue and white) stylized stencil portrait of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s face filling most of the square frame, in a posterized screen-print style. The face is built from blue and white shapes with small black speckle detailing; King looks slightly off-camera. In the lower-left, white serif text reads 'MLK' in large letters with '1929-1968' beneath it. The bottom-left corner carries the seal of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security and the bold 'ICE' wordmark. One dominant color with sans-serif and serif typography.
notable_text: MLK / 1929-1968 / ICE / U.S. Department of Homeland Security
